source_book: The 4 Disciplines of Execution (2nd ed.) — McChesney, Covey, Huling, Thele, Walker
_comment: Trigger requires a team leader, with Team WIG + leads already defined, asking how to design a single-team public scoreboard. Lures probe: personal-D3 misfire (solo user), member-D3 misfire (team member reading not designing), pre-D2 misfire (no leads yet), and multi-team enterprise BI misfire (cross-team aggregated dashboard).

test_cases.prompt: I lead a 7-person product team. We have our Team WIG (cut p99 latency 800ms→200ms by Q4) and two lead measures. Help me design our team scoreboard so the whole team actually sees it during work.
test_cases.expected_behavior: Activate 4dx-d3-team-lead-scoreboard-design; confirm WIG+leads exist, push team-builds-not-leader-authors, lock public display location, the 4 firm rules, plan team-build session, lock update ritual.
test_cases.notes: positive EN: textbook trigger — team leader, D1+D2 done, asks for team scoreboard design

test_cases.prompt: 8人チームのリーダーです。Team WIGとリード指標は決まりました。チームのスコアボードを設計したい。どう進めればいい?
test_cases.expected_behavior: 4dx-d3-team-lead-scoreboard-designを起動;チーム自身に作らせる/公開設置/4ルール(simple・visible・lead+lag with target line・5秒テスト)/ビルドセッション計画/更新リチュアルを順に詰める。
test_cases.notes: positive JP: explicit 'team の scoreboard を設計したい' phrasing

test_cases.prompt: 我帶一個 6 人團隊,Team WIG 跟領先指標都已經定好了。幫我設計 team 的 scoreboard,讓全隊每天都看得到。
test_cases.expected_behavior: 啟動 4dx-d3-team-lead-scoreboard-design;確認 WIG+領先指標已定,引導讓團隊自己建(非 leader 一個人畫)、公開展示、4 條硬規則、團隊共建工作坊、每週更新儀式。
test_cases.notes: positive zh-TW: '幫我設計 team 的 scoreboard' + '全隊都看得到' double signal

test_cases.prompt: I built a Notion board for my 5-person team — it has the WIG, the two leads, weekly progress, and a backlog tab. Nobody on the team looks at it outside our weekly meeting. What should I change?
test_cases.expected_behavior: Activate 4dx-d3-team-lead-scoreboard-design; diagnose coach's-as-players' substitution + leader-authored + dashboard-vs-database failure modes, redesign as ≤4-element public glance artifact team rebuilds together.
test_cases.notes: positive EN: classic team-scale 'hidden + over-complex + leader-authored' symptoms

test_cases.prompt: I have a personal WIG (run a sub-50-min 10K) and lead measures (3 runs/week). What kind of tracker should I use just for myself?
test_cases.expected_behavior: Do NOT activate; this is solo personal scope. Route to 4dx-d3-personal-scoreboard.
test_cases.notes: lure: personal D3 misfire — solo user, no team, wrong skill

test_cases.prompt: I'm a junior engineer on a team that just adopted 4DX. My manager put up a scoreboard but I don't really see how my work connects to the WIG. Can you help me read it?
test_cases.expected_behavior: Do NOT activate; this is a team-member trying to comprehend the WIG / their slice, not a leader designing the board. Route to 4dx-d1-member-team-wig-comprehension.
test_cases.notes: lure: member POV reading, not leader designing — wrong audience for this skill

test_cases.prompt: We're a VP team rolling out a unified BI dashboard that aggregates KPIs from 30 product teams across the company. Help us design the executive dashboard.
test_cases.expected_behavior: Do NOT activate; this is enterprise-wide multi-team BI / coach's-scoreboard scope, explicitly excluded by the boundary section. Generic dashboard design or org-BI advice is appropriate, not this skill.
test_cases.notes: lure: multi-team aggregated dashboard — wrong scope (single-team scoreboard skill)

test_cases.prompt: I lead a team and we just defined our Team WIG. What's the next step in 4DX?
test_cases.expected_behavior: Do NOT activate this skill; redirect to 4dx-d2-team-lead-measure-facilitation. D3 requires lead measures to already exist; the next step from D1 is D2, not D3.
test_cases.notes: lure: pre-D2 — looks 4DX-adjacent but skill's E step 1 halt condition explicitly redirects

test_cases.prompt: My agile team uses a burndown chart and velocity chart in Jira. Should I redesign those for sprint visibility?
test_cases.expected_behavior: Do NOT activate; burndown / velocity are work-in-progress charts (not WIG scoreboards with lead+lag+target-line), no Team WIG framing mentioned. Out of scope; explicitly listed under easily-confused neighboring methodologies.
test_cases.notes: lure: agile artifact surface-similar but not a 4DX team scoreboard

test_cases.prompt: We have our Team WIG and two leads. My team is fully remote across 4 timezones — there's no wall to put a scoreboard on. Should I just skip the scoreboard?
test_cases.expected_behavior: Activate 4dx-d3-team-lead-scoreboard-design; reject the skip-it framing per book Ch 4 (dispersed teams use 4DX app or shared digital surface visible on every desktop / mobile, not no scoreboard); proceed with the rest of E (team-builds-it, 4 rules, update ritual). Soften peer-comparison framing for cross-cultural / remote context.
test_cases.notes: boundary: remote-team excuse pattern — book is explicit dispersed teams still get a scoreboard; skill must fire AND deliver dispersed-team rule

test_cases.prompt: I'm planning to design our team scoreboard this weekend so I can show the team a polished version on Monday. What should I include?
test_cases.expected_behavior: Activate 4dx-d3-team-lead-scoreboard-design; flag leader-authored failure mode at E step 2 — book Ch 14 Step 3 is explicit that the team builds it; redirect to facilitating a team-build session, with leader holding the 4 firm rules and vetoing-not-dictating. Deliver session-plan output, not a scoreboard design.
test_cases.notes: boundary: leader-authored anti-pattern — skill must catch the engagement-killer framing and redirect to facilitation

ship_threshold_note: 100% to ship cleanly. >=80% allowed only with explicit failure analysis. <80% must redo Stage 2 A2/E/B. should_not_trigger has zero tolerance.
